Name: CharaInitParam
Description: Determines the loadout parameters for Armored Core type characters.

Fields.Name: Vitality
Fields.Description: The level of this stat.

Fields.Name: Attunement
Fields.Description: The level of this stat.

Fields.Name: Endurance
Fields.Description: The level of this stat.

Fields.Name: Strength
Fields.Description: The level of this stat.

Fields.Name: Dexterity
Fields.Description: The level of this stat.

Fields.Name: Intelligence
Fields.Description: The level of this stat.

Fields.Name: Faith
Fields.Description: The level of this stat.

Fields.Name: Resistance
Fields.Description: The level of this stat.

Fields.Name: Base HP
Fields.Description: The base HP given to the entity using this row.

Fields.Name: Base MP
Fields.Description: The base MP given to the entity using this row.

Fields.Name: Base Recovery Speed: MP
Fields.Description: MP recovery amount per second.

Fields.Name: Base Stamina
Fields.Description: The base Stamina given to the entity using this row.

Fields.Name: Base Recovery Speed: Stamina
Fields.Description: Stamina recovery amount per second.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage Correction %
Fields.Description: Damage reduction amount (%) that can serve as a cushion when being attacked from above by another character.

Fields.Name: Souls
Fields.Description: Amount of souls you have at the beginning.
